_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: while Akt and Erk were not active in tumors derived from animals injected with ΔBB or ΔBB/PID LF cells, both Akt and Erk were activated in lysates from the small tumors that developed in mice injected with ΔBB/PID
details: Detected low basal Erk activity in ΔBB and ΔBB/PID LF tumors, but elevated Erk activity in small ΔBB/PID tumors
